mapper.select: SELECT ANN_NO, TTL, REG_DTTM, TOP_FIX_YN FROM ( SELECT X.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY X.TOP_FIX_YN DESC, X.REG_DTTM DESC, X.ANN_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST X INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON X.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND X.DEL_YN = 'N' ) WHERE RN = ( SELECT RN + 1 FROM ( SELECT X.ANN_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY X.TOP_FIX_YN DESC, X.REG_DTTM DESC, X.ANN_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST X INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON X.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND X.DEL_YN = 'N' ) WHERE ANN_NO = #{annNo} )

SELECT ANN_NO, TTL, REG_DTTM, TOP_FIX_YN FROM ( SELECT X.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY X.TOP_FIX_YN DESC, X.REG_DTTM DESC, X.ANN_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST X INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON X.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND X.DEL_YN = 'N' ) WHERE RN = ( SELECT RN - 1 FROM ( SELECT X.ANN_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY X.TOP_FIX_YN DESC, X.REG_DTTM DESC, X.ANN_NO DESC ) AS RN FROM APT_ANN_BOARD_POST X INNER JOIN APT_BOARD_INSTANCE B ON X.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO WHERE B.APT_CMPLEX_NO = #{aptCmplexNo} AND B.BOARD_TY_CD = 'NOTICE' AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND X.DEL_YN = 'N' ) WHERE ANN_NO = #{annNo} )

/* * 입주민 공지사항 첨부파일 목록 조회 * * 한 공지에 파일이 여러 개일 수 있으므로 List로 조회한다. */
SELECT TO_CHAR(af.file_group_no) AS atch_file_id , af.file_og_name , af.mime_type , af.google_id FROM attach_file af WHERE TO_CHAR(af.file_group_no) = #{atchFileId} ORDER BY af.file_sort_order ASC
